heading: Recognition of precontribution gain in case of certain distributions to contributing partner

children.text: the excess (if any) of (A) the fair market value of property (other than money) received in the distribution over (B) the adjusted basis of such partner’s interest in the partnership immediately before the distribution reduced (but not below zero) by the amount of money received in the distribution, or
the net precontribution gain of the partner.
had been contributed to the partnership by the distributee partner within 7 years of the distribution, and
is held by such partnership immediately before the distribution,

children.heading: Partner’s interest
children.label: 1 Partner’s interest
children.text: The adjusted basis of a partner’s interest in a partnership shall be increased by the amount of any gain recognized by such partner under subsection (a). For purposes of determining the basis of the distributed property (other than money), such increase shall be treated as occurring immediately before the distribution.

children.heading: Partnership’s basis in contributed property
children.label: 2 Partnership’s basis in contributed property
children.text: Appropriate adjustments shall be made to the adjusted basis of the partnership in the contributed property referred to in subsection (b) to reflect gain recognized under subsection (a).

children.heading: Distributions of previously contributed property
children.label: 1 Distributions of previously contributed property
children.text: If any portion of the property distributed consists of property which had been contributed by the distributee partner to the partnership, such property shall not be taken into account under subsection (a)(1) and shall not be taken into account in determining the amount of the net precontribution gain. If the property distributed consists of an interest in an entity, the preceding sentence shall not apply to the extent that the value of such interest is attributable to property contributed to such entity after such interest had been contributed to the partnership.

children.heading: Coordination with section 751
children.label: 2 Coordination with section 751
children.text: This section shall not apply to the extent section 751(b) applies to such distribution.

children.heading: Marketable securities treated as money
children.label: e Marketable securities treated as money
children.text: For treatment of marketable securities as money for purposes of this section, see section 731(c).
